LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-10-2022 HEARING HELD RE: PLAINTIFF BOYETT CONSTRUCTION, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-06-2022 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2022 Continued To Sep-21-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Jan-10-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF BOYETT CONSTRUCTION, INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to compel arbitration and to stay proceedings pending arbitration" is granted.

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
